about.title: About Me
about.summary1: I am a dedicated Backend Specialist and Fullstack Developer with a passion for building scalable infrastructure and optimizing API performance. With years of experience across multiple companies and projects, I continuously strive to automate processes and integrate the latest technologies securely and efficiently.
about.summary2: My motivation relies on delivering robust systems that abstract complexity into seamless user experiences, backed by rigorous testing and architectural best practices.
